extraction.one_line_summary: EVENEPOEL attacked solo on Côte de la Redoute approximately 30km out, repeated his 2022 winning move, finished 1:50 ahead of chasers
tactical_patterns: EVENEPOEL repeated exact 2022 tactic (Redoute solo at 30km) successfully because POGAČAR crash eliminated only credible marker
HEALY attacked final kilometer for podium despite lacking sprint, revealing calculation that sitting in guaranteed fourth behind BUITRAGO/PIDCOCK
Soudal teammates pre-shredded field before EVENEPOEL attack, indicating Belgian squad pacing strategy differs from typical Monument leader isolation

rider_signals.EVENEPOEL Remco: positive: won by 1:50 margin using identical long-range move as 2022, suggesting rivals still lack answer to his acceleration sustainability
rider_signals.PIDCOCK Thomas: positive: second place 1:50 back but won chase group sprint, indicating Monument podium-level form without peak climbing
rider_signals.BUITRAGO Santiago: neutral: third in chase sprint but couldn't follow EVENEPOEL's Redoute acceleration despite being positioned
rider_signals.HEALY Ben: neutral: gambled with late solo attack from chase knowing sprint weakness, tactically correct but lacked power differential
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: mentioned third at Flèche but absent from decisive action here, suggesting one-day peak already passed
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: negative: crashed out at 90km after winning Amstel and Flèche, removing only rider expected to counter EVENEPOEL's acceleration
rider_signals.BENOOT Tiesj: positive: fifth place suggests strong Soudal depth beyond EVENEPOEL, reinforcing team's pre-attack attrition strategy
rider_signals.VLASOV Aleksandr: neutral: finished in Conrad group for top-10, indicating survival but not front-group climbing capacity
rider_signals.KONRAD Patrick: neutral: mentioned in top-10 group with VLASOV, consistent Monument support rider placement
rider_signals.CICCONE Giulio: neutral: sprinted for top-10 behind KONRAD group, suggesting domestique role rather than protected status
